parameters.query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.client, c.piid, c.idv, c.naics, c.contract_type, c.ceiling, c.funded, c.pop_start, c.pop_end, c.option_years, c.options_exercised, c.status, c.pm, c.cotr, c.employees, c.location, c.description, c.key_personnel, c.fy_revenue, c.ou, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM gda_active_contracts c ORDER BY (c.fy_revenue::jsonb->>'FY26')::numeric DESC NULLS LAST
